summary: Iteration 12 - Bug Fix Verification Complete. Both reported bugs are FIXED: (1) Refinance loan type now has 4 products (SBI, HDFC, ICICI, Axis balance transfer) - users selecting refinance during onboarding now get recommendations. (2) Dashboard empty state message now correctly shows 'No matching loans found' for users with completed profiles, and 'Complete your profile' ONLY for users without profiles. After logout/re-login, dashboard correctly shows recommendations instead of 'Complete your profile'.

issues: Minor Recharts console warning about chart dimensions during page transitions - does not affect functionality (same as iteration 11)

passed_tests: Backend: Health endpoint returns 200
Backend: GET /api/loans/products?loan_type=refinance returns 4 products
Backend: Total loan products is 56 (52 + 4 refinance)
Backend: All 10 loan types have products (personal, home, car, bike, education, refinance, gold, used_vehicle, plot, mutual_funds)
Backend: New user registration returns has_profile=false
Backend: New user without profile gets 400 on /loans/recommendations
Backend: After onboarding, /auth/me returns has_profile=true
Backend: Login returns has_profile=false for user without profile
Backend: Login returns has_profile=true for user who completed onboarding
Backend: Recommendations work for all 10 loan types
Backend: Admin login works with documented credentials
Frontend: Landing page loads correctly
Frontend: Registration flow works
Frontend: Onboarding nudge shows for users without profile
Frontend: Onboarding flow completes successfully (personal loan)
Frontend: Dashboard shows 13 personal loan recommendations after onboarding
Frontend: Dashboard does NOT show 'Complete your profile' after onboarding
Frontend: After logout and re-login, dashboard STILL shows recommendations (BUG FIXED)
Frontend: Refinance onboarding flow works
Frontend: Dashboard shows exactly 4 refinance recommendations (BUG FIXED)
Frontend: All 4 refinance products displayed (SBI, ICICI, HDFC, Axis Balance Transfer)
seed_data_creation: None - existing seed data used (4 refinance products were added by main agent)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both bugs from iteration 12 are verified as FIXED: (1) Refinance loan type now has 4 products - SBI, HDFC, ICICI, Axis balance transfer. (2) Dashboard empty state message is now contextually correct - shows 'No matching loans' for completed profiles, 'Complete your profile' only for incomplete profiles. The has_profile flag is correctly set and returned by login and /auth/me endpoints. Total products: 56 across 10 categories.

mocked_apis.Claude 4.5 chatbot: MOCKED - returns fallback message due to LLM budget exceeded

bug_1_refinance_products.description: Refinance loan type had 0 products, causing empty recommendations
bug_1_refinance_products.fix: Added 4 refinance/balance transfer products (SBI, HDFC, ICICI, Axis)
bug_1_refinance_products.verification: GET /api/loans/products?loan_type=refinance returns 4 products, dashboard shows 4 recommendations for refinance users

bug_2_empty_state_message.description: Dashboard always showed 'Complete your profile' even for users who completed onboarding but had no matching products
bug_2_empty_state_message.fix: DashboardPage.js now checks user.has_profile to show contextually correct message
bug_2_empty_state_message.verification: After onboarding, dashboard shows recommendations. After logout/re-login, dashboard STILL shows recommendations (not 'Complete your profile')
